overview: A professional Telegram account migration dashboard with a full step-by-step wizard. Log in two accounts, scan all chats, channels, groups, folders and bots, preview what will transfer, then watch the migration happen live with real-time progress tracking.
features: 5-step migration wizard (Auth → Scan → Preview → Execute → Done)
Dual-account authentication with phone number, verification code, and QR code flows
Account scanner showing all chats, channels, groups, folders, and bots with realistic mock data
Transfer preview with per-item strategy display (auto-join vs replicate)
Live transfer progress bars, status log, and migration summary
Persistent sessions and transfer jobs stored in backend
Dark professional dashboard with sidebar navigation
